'''Nautag d'al' Gargan''' was the [[Gender/Legends|husband]] of [[Yarna d'al' Gargan/Legends|Yarna d'al' Gargan]]. They had three children: [[Luka d'al' Gargan|Luka]], [[Leia d'al' Gargan|Leia]], and his namesake, [[Nautag d'al' Gargan II|Nautag]]. While raising their cubs in their home on [[Askaji/Legends|Askaj]], Nautag and [[Gargan family|his family]] were kidnapped and sold to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. When Jabba told [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] to bring his cubs to him, Nautag stepped forward in defense. The Hutt laughed and challenged him to a fight. Nautag charged forward, but Jabba activated the trap door and Nautag was eaten by [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|his]] [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]].
